g.text: 802 Bankview Dr, Drumheller, Alberta | File VAL251026
The subject is located in the Neighbourhood District (ND) zoning area which is to enable primarily ground-oriented
residential development with an emphasis on diverse, walkable neighbourhoods with varying built forms and
The current use for the subject property is walkup and is a permitted use based on the current zoning guidelines. A
zoning change for the subject does not appear likely. Based on the foregoing, it appears that the subject’s
improvements are a legally conforming use of the subject site.
